nasb.text: and the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper. They were set in gold filigree settings when they were mounted.

esv.text: and the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper. They were enclosed in settings of gold filigree.

cnv.text: 第四行是水蒼玉、紅瑪瑙、碧玉；這些寶石都是鑲在金槽裡。

ccb.text: 第四行是水苍玉、红玛瑙和碧玉。以上四行宝石都镶在胸牌的金框内。
